package rulecoverage

func PositiveSharedIntegrationTestSetupNotCentralizedUnderTestSupport() string {
    ruleID := "shared_integration_test_setup_not_centralized_under_test_support"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated app, DB, or router bootstrapping that is not moved into shared test support."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
